Update your account information and pref: Update your account information and preferred language.
Safe, explicit orchestration for Docker: Bezpecna a jasna orchestrace zaloh a obnov Docker svazku.
Inspect discovered Docker volumes and st: Inspect discovered Docker volumes and start backup jobs from the volumes that matter.
Group discovered Docker volumes by Compo: Group discovered Docker volumes by Compose or Swarm stack and review backup coverage.
Schedule, pause, run, and restore Docker: Schedule, pause, run, and restore Docker volume backups from one place.
Planujte, pozastavujte, spoustejte a obnovujte zalohy Docker svazku nebo hostitelskych cest z jednoho mista.
Choose the source volume, destination, s: Choose the source volume, destination, schedule, retention, and backup exclusions.
Choose the backup source, destination, s: Vyberte zdroj zalohy, cil, plan, uchovani a vylouceni.
Review schedule, destination, run histor: Review schedule, destination, run history, and recovery actions for this job.
Inspect container output, status, timing: Inspect container output, status, timing, and errors for this backup run.
Choose a backup archive and restore it i: Choose a backup archive and restore it into a new Docker volume.
Inspect source, target, selected archive: Inspect source, target, selected archive, logs, and errors for this restore run.
Configure encrypted storage targets for: Configure encrypted storage targets for backup archives and installation saves.
Store destination settings and credentia: Store destination settings and credentials encrypted at rest.
Route backup results to Shoutrrr channel: Route backup results to Shoutrrr channels for all or selected jobs.
Smerovat vysledky zaloh do kanalu Shoutrrr vybranych pro kazdou ulohu.
Configure one alert channel and decide w: Configure one alert channel and decide which backup results it receives.
Configure one alert channel and its deli: Nastavte jeden kanal upozorneni a jeho chovani odesilani.
Manage team access, roles, and preferred: Manage team access, roles, and preferred languages.
Set account access, language, and login: Set account access, language, and login credentials.
Update your account information, languag: Update your account information, language, and password.
Issue scoped Bearer tokens for external: Issue scoped Bearer tokens for external automation.
Export or upload an encrypted snapshot o: Export or upload an encrypted snapshot of this VolumeVault installation.
Name: Jmeno
Leave empty to keep the current password: Nechte prazdne pro zachovani aktualniho hesla.
Back up an existing directory from the D: Zalohujte existujici adresar z Docker hostitele.
Back up a Docker-managed volume discover: Zalohujte Dockerem spravovany svazek nalezeny VolumeVaultem.
May temporarily interrupt containers usi: Muze docasne prerusit kontejnery pouzivajici tento svazek.
Choose which notification channels this: Vyberte, ktere kanaly oznameni muze tato uloha pouzit. Neaktivni kanaly zustanou vybrane, ale neodesilaji, dokud nebudou znovu aktivovany.
Create a notification channel first, or: Nejprve vytvorte kanal oznameni, nebo ulozte tuto ulohu bez oznameni.
Files whose full path matches this Go re: Soubory, jejichz cela cesta odpovida tomuto regularnimu vyrazu Go, budou z archivu vylouceny. Ponechte prazdne pro zahrnuti vseho.
Not comfortable with regex? Start with o: Nejste si jisti regexem? Zacnete jednim z techto prikladu:
Ask for help if you are unsure: describe: Pokud si nejste jisti, pozadejte o pomoc: popiste, co se ma ignorovat, napriklad logy nebo slozky cache, a VolumeVault muze s regexem poradit.
You need at least one existing Docker vo: Pred vytvorenim ulohy potrebujete alespon jeden existujici Docker svazek a jeden aktivni cil zalohy.
You need at least one active backup dest: Pred vytvorenim ulohy potrebujete alespon jeden aktivni cil zalohy.
Sync Docker volumes first, or choose a h: Nejprve synchronizujte Docker svazky, nebo vyberte zdroj cesty na hostiteli.
The path must be an existing directory o: Cesta musi byt existujici adresar na Docker hostiteli. Pokud je nastaveno VOLUMEVAULT_HOST_PATH_ALLOWLIST, musi odpovidat jednomu z povolenych prefixu.
Sync volumes, add a destination, then cr: Synchronizujte svazky, pridejte cil a vytvorte prvni planovanou zalohu.
Add a destination, then choose a Docker: Pridejte cil a potom vyberte Docker svazek nebo cestu na hostiteli pro prvni planovanou zalohu.
Delete this backup job and its run histo: Smazat tuto ulohu a jeji historii?
Make sure VolumeVault can access the Doc: Ujistete se, ze VolumeVault ma pristup k Docker socketu.
Delete this destination? Jobs using it w: Smazat tento cil? Ulohy, ktere ho pouzivaji, budou take odstraneny.
Keep the default message, or override th: Keep the default message, or override the title and body sent after backup runs.
Default channel for new backup jobs: Vychozi kanal pro nove zalozni ulohy
Preselect this channel when creating bac: Predvybere tento kanal pri vytvareni zaloznich uloh. Neomezuje, ktere kanaly muze uloha pouzit.
Configure Discord, Telegram, Ntfy, Gotif: Nastavte Discord, Telegram, Ntfy, Gotify, e-mail nebo pokrocilou URL Shoutrrr jednou a potom vyberte kanaly pro kazdou zalozni ulohu.
URLs are encrypted at rest and never ret: URL jsou v klidu sifrovane a po ulozeni se nikdy nevraceji do prohlizece.
Add one channel, test it, then select it: Pridejte kanal, otestujte ho a potom ho vyberte v zaloznich ulohach.
No backup objects found. Run a backup fi: Nenalezeny zadne objekty zalohy. Nejprve spustte zalohu nebo zkontrolujte cestu cile.
Review visible product changes, migratio: Zkontrolujte viditelne zmeny produktu, migrace a poznamky k vydani pro tuto instalaci.
VolumeVault was updated. Review the impo: VolumeVault byl aktualizovan. Pred pokracovanim zkontrolujte dulezite zmeny.
No update summary is available for this: Pro tuto verzi neni dostupny souhrn aktualizace.
Report a problem or suggest an improveme: Report a problem or suggest an improvement
Monitor backup health, job failures, sta: Sleduje stav zaloh, selhani uloh, zastarale zalohy a neobvykle velikosti archivu.
Resolved alerts stay visible here, while: Vyresena upozorneni zde zustavaji viditelna a kazde spusteni i vyreseni se uklada do historie.
Subject: Predmet
Enable alert rules to start monitoring b: Zapnete pravidla upozorneni a zacnete sledovat stav zaloh.
Inspect alert state, context, notificati: Zkontrolujte stav, kontext, notifikace a historii upozorneni.
Every trigger, reminder, notification, a: Kazde spusteni, pripomenuti, notifikace a vyreseni se zaznamenava zde.
Configure global alert rules and reminde: Nastavte globalni pravidla upozorneni a chovani pripomenuti.
Job in error too long: Uloha je prilis dlouho v chybe
Warn when a job has not produced a succe: Upozornit, kdyz uloha nedavno nevytvorila uspesnou zalohu.
Detect jobs that keep finishing without: Rozpoznat ulohy, ktere konci bez uspesne zalohy.
Escalate jobs that stay in error longer: Hlasit ulohy, ktere zustavaji v chybe dele, nez se ocekava.
Detect unusually small or large successf: Rozpoznat neobvykle male nebo velke uspesne zalohovaci archivy.
Warn when a backup destination exceeds i: Upozornit, kdyz cil zaloh prekroci nastavene absolutni prahy uloziste.
Minutes between checks for this alert ty: Minuty mezi kontrolami pro tento typ upozorneni.
Send repeated notifications while the al: Odesilat opakovane notifikace, dokud upozorneni zustava aktivni.
Choose which channels receive destinatio: Vyberte kanaly pro upozorneni na limit uloziste. Pokud neni vybran zadny, upozorneni zustanou viditelna jen ve VolumeVault.
Create a notification channel before ena: Pred zapnutim externich notifikaci pro toto upozorneni vytvorte notifikacni kanal.
Configure absolute usage thresholds for: Nastavte absolutni prahy vyuziti pro upozorneni na limit uloziste. Nechte oba prazdne pro preskoceni tohoto cile.
Control proactive alert notifications an: Ridte proaktivni notifikace upozorneni a volitelne prahy pro jednotlive ulohy.
Send alert notifications to this job's s: Odesilat upozorneni do vybranych kanalu teto ulohy.
Override global alert thresholds for thi: Prepsat globalni prahy upozorneni pro tuto ulohu.
This job uses the global alert configura: Tato uloha pouziva globalni konfiguraci upozorneni.
job_in_error_too_long: uloha je prilis dlouho v chybe
